title: bromopsis paulsenii subsp. angrenica
intro: Bromopsis paulsenii subsp. angrenica, also known as a subspecies of mountain bentgrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Bromopsis paulsenii subsp. angrenica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of this plant may be used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
